#                         NOTE (v1.0.1): This column has been cleared for now. A review found a high rate of

# word_id                Corresponding character ID in sbgy.xml (8-digit number excluding 'w' prefix)
# wuyun                  Traditional Five Tones classification (五音: 舌音
# entry_index            Index number of the entry

# qingzhuo               Fourfold classification of voicing (清濁: 全清
# shengmu                Initial consonant (声母) based on the Thirty-Six Initials (三十六字母) system (Song Dynasty style)

# she_kaihe_deng         Combined description of Rhyme Group (攝)
# fanqie_marked          Fanqie string marked with a head circle (○)
